description: Add a notification center with persistent read state, unread badge, filtering, and clear-read behavior.

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state to persist across sessions so that I do not lose read/unread context.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification records store read state
Existing records default read state to unread
Read state is retained after sign-out and next sign-in
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement notification read-state update operations
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark individual notifications read or unread so that I can control what needs attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend operations support mark-read and mark-unread for a notification
Only the notification owner can update its read state
Updated read state is returned to clients
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement notification list filtering and clear-read operation
userStories.description: As a user, I want read-state filtering and a clear-read action so that I can manage notification noise.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list query supports filters for all, unread, and read
Clear-read operation deletes or archives only read notifications
Unread notifications remain after clear-read operation
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread badge and notification center list surface
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge and a notification list panel so that I can quickly see pending notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: App header shows unread badge count
Clicking notification entry point opens notification list
List items visually indicate read versus unread state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add notification item read and unread controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want controls on notification items to mark read or unread so that I can manage each item directly.
acceptanceCriteria: Each notification item includes mark-read and mark-unread controls as appropriate
Using the control updates item state without page reload
Unread badge count updates after state change
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add read-state filters and clear-read control in notification center
userStories.description: As a user, I want read-state filters and a clear-read control in the notification center so that I can focus on relevant notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center includes filter options All, Unread, and Read
Clear read notifications control is visible and actionable
After clear-read action, list refreshes and shows remaining notifications
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
